mermaid_diagram_guidelines.overview: Mermaid diagrams are powerful visual tools that help illustrate repository structure, relationships, and workflows. You MUST create Mermaid diagrams throughout the audit process to visualize findings and make complex information more accessible.
mermaid_diagram_guidelines.mandatory_requirement: ALWAYS create Mermaid diagrams when analyzing: - Document class hierarchies and inheritance - Folder structure and organization patterns - Integration architecture and data flows - Implementation roadmap phases and timelines - Property relationships across classes - Workflow processes and state transitions

type.name: class_diagram
type.purpose: Visualize document class hierarchies and inheritance relationships

type.name: folder_hierarchy
type.purpose: Visualize folder structure and organization patterns
type.example:
```mermaid graph TD Root["/"] --> BOB["/BOB_LAB"] Root --> RAF["/Raiffeisen"] Root --> INV["/MyInvenio/HR"]
BOB --> JABRI["JABRI"] JABRI --> JAB001["JAB001_Jade Robin"] JAB001 --> J01["01_Recruitment"] JAB001 --> J02["02_Employment_Contract"] JAB001 --> J08["...08_Exit"]
style BOB fill:#e1f5ff style RAF fill:#fff4e1 style INV fill:#f0ffe1 ```

type.name: integration_architecture
type.purpose: Visualize integration points and data flows
type.example:
```mermaid graph LR FileNet[IBM FileNet Repository]
SAP[SAP] -->|8 properties| FileNet SF[Salesforce] -->|2 properties| FileNet GenAI[Watsonx] -->|2 properties| FileNet DS[DocuSign] -->|2 properties| FileNet
FileNet -->|Retrieval| SAP FileNet -->|Sync| SF
style FileNet fill:#4a90e2,color:#fff style SAP fill:#f39c12 style SF fill:#00a1e0 ```

type.name: timeline_gantt
type.purpose: Visualize implementation roadmap and project phases
type.example: ```mermaid gantt title Implementation Roadmap dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD section Phase 1 Governance Framework :p1, 2026-06-01, 2w Documentation :p2, after p1, 2w section Phase 2 Class Consolidation :p3, after p2, 8w ```

type.name: flowchart
type.purpose: Visualize processes, workflows, and decision trees
type.example:
```mermaid flowchart TD Start([Start Audit]) --> Connect{MCP Connected?} Connect -->|Yes| Discover[Discover Classes] Connect -->|No| Error[Report Error] Discover --> Analyze[Analyze Properties] Analyze --> Report[Generate Reports] Report --> Complete([Complete])
style Start fill:#90EE90 style Complete fill:#90EE90 ```

best_practices.practice: Always include diagrams in audit reports - visual representations make complex information accessible
Create diagrams progressively as you gather information, not just at the end
Use consistent styling and color schemes across related diagrams
Add notes and annotations to clarify complex relationships
Keep diagrams focused - create multiple simple diagrams rather than one complex diagram
Include diagram titles and legends when needed

diagram_placement.location: - High-level folder hierarchy (simplified) - Integration architecture overview - Implementation timeline (Gantt chart)
- Complete class hierarchy diagram - Class consolidation before/after comparison - Property inheritance visualization
- Complete folder hierarchy for each organization - Folder naming pattern comparison - Proposed standardized structure
- Integration architecture with data flows - Property mapping across integrations
- Gantt chart showing all phases - Dependency flowchart

pattern.name: class_consolidation
pattern.description: Show before and after state of class consolidation
pattern.template: ```mermaid graph LR subgraph "Current" D1[Document] --> I1[Invoice_ach] D1 --> I2[JKJInvoice] end subgraph "Proposed" D2[Document] --> I3[Invoice Unified] end I1 -.->|Migrate| I3 I2 -.->|Migrate| I3 style I3 fill:#90EE90 style I1 fill:#FFB6C1 ```

pattern.name: folder_naming_comparison
pattern.template: ```mermaid graph TD subgraph "BOB_LAB" B1["JAB001_Name"] end subgraph "Raiffeisen" R1["COG001_Name"] end subgraph "Proposed" P1["BOB000001_Name"] end B1 -.->|Standardize| P1 R1 -.->|Standardize| P1 style P1 fill:#90EE90 ```

mandatory_diagrams.requirement: Create classDiagram showing all discovered classes and inheritance
Create graph TD for folder hierarchy of each organization
Create graph LR showing integration architecture and data flows
Create gantt chart with all phases and milestones
Create before/after comparison for consolidation opportunities

mermaid_diagram_guidelines.quality_checklist: - Diagram has clear title or context - All nodes have meaningful labels - Relationships clearly indicated with arrows - Color coding is consistent and meaningful - Not overcrowded (max 20 nodes recommended) - Important notes are annotated - Syntax is valid and renders correctly - Adds value beyond text description
